sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39454" key="e)pi/qlasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίθλᾰσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n39454.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fracture</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">περίθλασις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:5:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.5.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
